name: CONTRACT-BUG-27
title: test-files-exist.py does not check skill-template, command-template, or handoff-template
description: test/test-files-exist.py lists only 8 templates (lines 32-39) but spec Surface declares 10 templates including skill-template.md and command-template.md. handoff-template.md exists in templates/ but is not declared in spec Surface.
